ns0:entry.ns0:title: Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI
Language: go
Autonomous penetration testing using a swarm of AI agents. Orchestrates recon, classification, exploitation, and reporting specialists with ReAct reasoning — supports bug bounty, continuous monitoring, and CTF modes. Built with Go, Claude API, and 7+ native security tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: argoproj/argo-cd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd
Language: go
Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
Language: go
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: guohuiyuan/go-music-dl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/guohuiyuan/go-music-dl
Language: go
一个基于 Go 语言的全网音乐搜索与下载工具。支持 CLI 命令行与 Web 服务双模式，内置网易云、QQ、酷狗、Bilibili、汽水音乐等 10+ 个主流平台，支持多源并发搜索与无损音质解析。music-dl交流群：1074285005

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harness/harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harness/harness
Language: go
Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/vault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
Language: go
A tool for secrets management, encryption as a service, and privileged access management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jackc/pgx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jackc/pgx
Language: go
PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
Language: go
agent-sandbox enables easy management of isolated, stateful, singleton workloads, ideal for use cases like AI agent runtimes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kunchenguid/no-mistakes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kunchenguid/no-mistakes
Language: go
git push no-mistakes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kunchenguid/treehouse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kunchenguid/treehouse
Language: go
Manage worktrees without managing worktrees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: milvus-io/milvus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus
Language: go
Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: go
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: navidrome/navidrome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/navidrome/navidrome
Language: go
🎧 Your Personal Streaming Service

Language: go
Exporter for machine metrics

Language: go
The Prometheus monitoring system and time series database.

The easiest, most secure way to use WireGuard and 2FA.
